name: Sant Joginder Singh (Domeli Wale)
body: Sant Joginder Singh Ji is a lovely soul who is also blessed with the gift of Kirtan and Katha. Sant Ji lost his eyesight at a very young age due to an infection and was brought to the village of Domeli. Here, Sant Ji was raised by Sant Duleep Singh Ji and later on by Sant Harbans Singh Ji as well. Sant Joginder Singh Ji received his training in Gurmat Sangeet under the guidance of the renowned Sant Sarwan Singh Ji ‘Gandharv’ of Domeli who was also popularly known as ‘Raaga Singh’. Sant Ji moved to Amritsar to further his knowledge in Gurmat Sangeet and also studied ‘Gurbani Vidhya’ at Shaheed Mani Singh Ji’s Taksal in Sato Wali Gali, Amritsar under the guidance of Sant Kirpal Singh Ji. It was here that Sant Ji was blessed with Amrit by Sant Gurbachan Singh Ji Khalsa ‘Bhindranwale’ Jatha. In addition, Sant Joginder Singh Ji also attained a diploma in classical music from Allahabad University of India.

Sant Joginder Singh Ji originally came to the United Kingdom (UK) with Sant Harbans Singh Ji and had initially planned to stay for 2 months, but ended up settling down in the UK. In the early years that Sant Ji spent in the UK, he travelled extensively to many cities. With the support of the Sangat, they built and established Guru Har Rai Sahib’s Darbar in West Bromwich. Sant Ji has dedicated his whole life to the cause of ‘Sikhi’ and is still carrying out the service that was entrusted to him by Sant Harbans Singh Ji and the Sangat. Sant Joginder Singh Ji has organised free eye camps in Anandpur Sahib every month and has also built the Mata Sahib Kaur Yatri Niwas for Sangat visiting Anandpur Sahib to stay in. This was made possible with the support of both the local Sangat and from abroad. Sant Ji has also built a Guru Ghar in Anandpur Sahib on Guru Har Rai Sahib’s name. The information above was obtained from Veer Jujhar Singh and also from a thread found on the ‘Sikh Sangat’ website. If anyone has more photos or recordings of Sant Joginder Singh Ji to share, please contact us.
